data.title: Whitefield Income Limited Announces New Dividend Distribution
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Whitefield income limited ( (AU:WHI) ).

Whitefield Income Limited has announced a new dividend distribution of AUD 0.00583 per share, covering the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The ex-date for this distribution is April 15, 2025, with the record date set for April 16, 2025, and payment to be made on April 30, 2025. This announcement underscores the company’s ongoing strategy to provide regular income to its shareholders, reinforcing its position in the financial market.

More about Whitefield income limited

Whitefield Income Limited operates in the financial sector, focusing on providing income through investments. The company is known for its dividend distributions to shareholders, reflecting its commitment to delivering consistent returns.

data.title: Whitefield Income Limited Declares 8% Yield Monthly Dividends for Q2 2025
data.description:
The latest update is out from Whitefield income limited ( (AU:WHI) ).

Whitefield Income Limited has announced fully franked monthly dividends of 0.583 cents per share to be paid in April, May, and June 2025, equating to a gross yield of 8% per annum. This announcement reflects the company’s commitment to providing consistent returns to its shareholders, potentially strengthening its market position and appealing to income-focused investors.

More about Whitefield income limited

Whitefield Income Limited operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing investment opportunities through income-generating financial products.

data.title: Trans Canada Gold Corp. Reports March Oil Shipment and New Drilling Plans
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Trans Canada Gold ( (TSE:TTG) ).

Trans Canada Gold Corp. announced the shipment of 4,558 barrels of oil from its Lloydminster multilateral heavy oil wells in March 2025, despite facing logistical challenges due to limited railcar access. The company is set to participate in drilling a new multilateral well, expected to open 3,000 meters of the Sparky formation, with drilling costs fully funded from production cash flow. This strategic move aligns with their ongoing exploration and production expansion efforts, potentially enhancing their market position and offering growth opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Trans Canada Gold

Trans Canada Gold Corp. is a discovery-focused oil and gas resource development and mineral exploration company. It is primarily engaged in developing and drilling conventional heavy oil exploration properties in Alberta, Canada, with a focus on increasing production capabilities and future oil production revenues. The company collaborates with Croverro Energy Ltd. and employs a qualified team of professionals experienced in exploration production, field exploration, and drilling.

YTD Price Performance: -20.0%

Average Trading Volume: 35,884

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.05M

data.title: Yodogawa Steel Works Corrects Share Split Notice
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Yodogawa Steel Works ( (JP:5451) ).

Yodogawa Steel Works, Ltd. announced a correction to its previously released notice regarding a share split and amendment to its Articles of Incorporation. The correction involves the total number of issuable shares after the share split, which was initially misstated. The corrected total number of issuable shares is now 636,744,600, down from the previously stated 715,000,000. This adjustment ensures accurate corporate records and reflects the company’s commitment to transparency and accuracy in its financial disclosures.

More about Yodogawa Steel Works

data.title: Arika Resources Unveils Promising Gold Intercepts at Pennyweight Point
data.description:
Metalicity Limited ( (AU:ARI) ) has provided an update.

Arika Resources Limited has announced significant results from its maiden diamond drilling campaign at the Pennyweight Point Prospect, part of the Yundamindra Gold JV Project in Western Australia. The drilling revealed high-grade gold intercepts, confirming the presence of a substantial mineral system with potential for further exploration. The results extend the known mineralization by 50 meters down-plunge and highlight the potential for significant depth and strike extensions. The project remains open for further exploration, with plans to resume drilling to test new targets, positioning Arika as a promising player in the gold mining sector.

More about Metalicity Limited

Arika Resources Limited, trading as ASX: ARI, operates in the mining industry with a focus on gold exploration. The company is actively engaged in the Yundamindra Gold JV Project, located in the Eastern Goldfields mining district of Western Australia, where it is exploring the Pennyweight Point Prospect for gold mineralization.

Average Trading Volume: 6,706

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €5.51M

data.title: IIFL Finance Announces Early Closure of NCD Tranche I Issue
data.description:
IIFL Finance Limited ( (IN:IIFL) ) has shared an update.

IIFL Finance Limited announced the early closure of its Tranche I public issue of non-convertible debentures, initially scheduled to close on April 23, 2025, but now set to close on April 11, 2025. This decision reflects strong investor demand and may enhance the company’s financial position, potentially impacting its market strategy and stakeholder interests positively.

More about IIFL Finance Limited

IIFL Finance Limited operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of products including secured, rated, listed, redeemable, non-convertible debentures. The company focuses on providing financial solutions and investment opportunities to its clients, with a significant market presence in India.

data.title: Aussie Broadband Outlines Strategic Growth and Strengthens Optus Partnership
data.description:
An update from Aussie Broadband Ltd. ( (AU:ABB) ) is now available.

Aussie Broadband Ltd. announced its strategic ambitions for the next three years during its Investor Day, aiming for significant revenue growth and diversification. The company targets group revenue to exceed $1.6 billion by FY28, with an EBITDA margin expansion and a focus on increasing its NBN market share. Additionally, Aussie Broadband reported its best organic quarterly net growth in connections in three years and signed a binding Heads of Agreement with Optus to enhance its mobile service offerings, strengthening its market position and unlocking new growth opportunities.

More about Aussie Broadband Ltd.

Aussie Broadband Ltd. operates in the telecommunications industry, providing internet and mobile services. The company focuses on diversifying its revenue streams and expanding its market share in the NBN sector.
